# Tanda AI

> Tanda AI builds and deploys conversational voice AI agents for businesses. Our agents handle inbound and outbound calls, qualify leads, book appointments, and route calls to human agents — so your team can focus on closing.

## What We Do

Tanda AI is a platform that builds and deploys voice AI agents for business automation. We replace manual call handling with intelligent, always-on AI that sounds human, integrates with your tools, and goes live in days — not months.

## Services

- **Inbound Voice AI**: 24/7 call answering, lead qualification, appointment booking, FAQ handling, and smart call routing
- **Outbound Voice AI**: Automated follow-up calls, appointment reminders, and outreach campaigns
- **AI Receptionist**: A fully branded virtual front desk that handles all customer calls around the clock
- **Voice AI Strategy**: Consulting and custom AI agent design tailored to your business call flows

## Features

- Natural Language Understanding — conversational AI that understands intent, not just keywords
- Custom Voice & Persona — branded voice identity that matches your company tone
- Smart Call Routing — context-aware transfers to the right team or human agent
- Lead Qualification — automatically scores and qualifies leads during the call
- Call Analytics — full transcripts, sentiment analysis, and performance dashboards
- CRM & Tool Sync — integrates with your existing CRM, calendar, and business tools

## Who We Help

Service businesses, medical clinics, real estate agencies, law firms, and e-commerce brands — any organisation that handles high call volumes and wants reliable, always-on call management without expanding headcount.

## Pricing

- **Starter**: $50/month
- **Pro**: $90/month (most popular)
- **Enterprise**: Custom pricing

Most clients go live within 5–10 business days after onboarding.

## Contact

- Website: https://tandaai.com
- Email: hello@tandaai.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/tandaai/
- Response time: within 24 hours

## FAQ

**What is a voice AI agent?**
A voice AI agent is an intelligent virtual assistant that handles real phone calls — answering questions, booking appointments, qualifying leads, and more — using natural, human-like speech.

**How human does the voice sound?**
Very natural. We use the latest voice synthesis technology to create warm, fluent voices that callers rarely distinguish from a real person.

**What kinds of businesses use voice AI?**
Service businesses, clinics, real estate agencies, e-commerce brands — any business that regularly receives or makes calls and wants to handle them more efficiently.

**How fast can we go live?**
Most clients are live within 5–10 business days, depending on call flow complexity and the number of integrations required.

**Can the AI hand off to a human?**
Yes. When a caller needs escalation, the AI seamlessly transfers the call to a live agent and provides a full context summary so nothing is repeated.
